[[Georgia Rucker]] |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |release date=[[December]] [[1997]] {{C|First printing}}''Star Wars Kids'' 6 |subscribers=[[February]] [[1998]] {{C|Release}}''Star Wars Kids'' 6 was released packaged with ''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'', for which the [[StarWars.com]] Cargo Bay [https://web.archive.org/web/20040803144738/http://cargobay.starwars.com/webapps/cargobay/item-detail/625 listed] a release date of [[February]] [[1998]]. ''The Search for Grubba the Hutt'' additionally denotes a [[February]] 1998 release date. |pages=26 |isbn=0-590-91610-6 |issn= |genre= |issue=6 |series=[[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997)]] }} '''''Star Wars Kids'' 6''' is the sixth issue [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[February]] [[1998]]. Issue 6 included part one of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[X-Wing Marks the Spot]]'', written by [[Mike W. Barr]]. ''Star Wars Kids'' 6 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 6 came packaged with the game's sixth adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt|''The Search for Grubba the Hutt'']]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== ===Features=== *'''"[[Star Wars Kids Answer Quest]]"''' *:Young Jedi Knights want to know... *'''"Space Science: Meteors"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller]] *'''"[[Meet...|Meet Wicket!]]"''' by [[Scott Chernoff]] *:''Star Wars Kids'' Talks To The "Ever-Ready Ewok," Warwick Davis. *'''"[[Who Is That Alien?]] Ewoks & Sullustans"''' by [[Bill Smith]] *'''"Star Wars: The Magic of Myth"''' by [[Melissa J. Perenson]] *'''"[[Star Wars Kids Feature Planet]]: Endor"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller|Terry Hiller]] *:Where On Earth Is... Endor? *'''"[[X-Wing Marks the Spot|''X-Wing Marks the Spot, Part 1'']]"''' by [[Mike W. Barr]] ===Departments=== *'''"A-maze-ing Universe"''' *'''"''Star Wars Missions'' Bonus Page"''' *'''"Brain Blasters"''' *:...For the ultimate ''Star Wars'' fan. *'''"Yoda's Puzzle Pages"''' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{KidsNav|5|7}} {{Interlang |es=Star Wars Kids 6 |fi=Star Wars Kids 6 }} [[Category:Star Wars Kids (1997) issues|06]]
